title: My Solo Trip to Switzerland 🇨🇭 one week in the swiss alps travel vlog ⛰️

questions.question: What does 'car-free town' mean in this context?
options: A) A town without any vehicles allowed inside
B) A town where cars are not for rent
C) A town with limited parking spaces
D) A town that sells cars at cheap prices
questions.explanation: 根据字幕内容，Miran是一个car-free town（无车小镇），这意味着镇上不允许车辆行驶，只有楼梯或坡道。游客只能步行或使用其他非机动车方式出行。

questions.question: What does 'risk-free' mean in the context of the flight booking?
options: A) The flight might be cancelled
B) There is no financial risk if not accepted
C) The flight is guaranteed to be safe
D) There are no safety concerns on the flight
questions.explanation: 视频中提到如果你的申请没有被接受，你不需要支付任何额外费用，只需保留原价票。这说明这个预订选项是没有财务风险的。

questions.question: Why did the speaker decide to stay in Miran?
options: A) Because it's the cheapest place
B) Because it's less crowded as a car-free town
C) Because it has the best restaurants
D) Because it's close to the airport
questions.explanation: 视频中明确提到：I decided to stay in Miran this time because it's a car-free town, so it's less crowded. 这解释了选择Miran的原因。

questions.question: What does 'overstimulated' mean in this context?
options: A) Very excited and energetic
B) Feeling overwhelmed by too many sensations
C) Extremely happy and content
D) Fully focused on one thing
questions.explanation: 当作者说I was getting so overstimulated时，是指在走了一段时间后，感官受到了太多刺激而感到疲惫不堪，需要转身回去。这是一个描述感官过载的词汇。

questions.question: What is a 'trail' in hiking context?
options: A) A type of food for hiking
B) A marked path for walking/hiking
C) A vehicle for mountain travel
D) A rest area with benches
questions.explanation: 在徒步旅行的语境中，trail指的是徒步小径、山路。视频中多次提到trails，如shorter versions of trails that lead you to the same destination。

questions.question: What does 'reflection' mean in 'we will see a reflection'?
options: A) Thinking deeply about something
B) The image seen in water/mirror
C) A story about the past
D) A second attempt at something
questions.explanation: 在描述山景时，reflection指的是倒影。视频中说going to take us straight up to the lake where we will see a reflection，意思是在湖边可以看到山景的倒影。

questions.question: What does 'stumbled upon' mean in this context?
options: A) Planned to visit deliberately
B) Found something by accident
C) Got lost while looking for
D) Decided to avoid something
questions.explanation: stumbled upon意思是偶然发现、意外遇到。视频中说I stumbled upon this gift shop，意思是她原本没有计划去那个礼品店，但是偶然发现了它。

questions.question: What does 'heading to the trail head' mean?
options: A) Leaving the trail completely
B) Starting to walk on the trail
C) Returning from the trail
D) Looking for the trail on a map
questions.explanation: trail head指的是徒步路线的起点/入口。heading to the trail head意思是朝徒步路线的起点走去，准备开始徒步。

questions.question: What does 'highlight' mean in 'one of the highlights of my trip'?
options: A) The most difficult part
B) The most interesting or memorable part
C) The cheapest part
D) The longest part
questions.explanation: highlight在这里指的是旅行中最精彩、最令人难忘的部分。作者说Main成为了她旅程的亮点之一。

questions.question: What does 'fully developed frontal' refer to in the context of turning 26?
options: A) Physical appearance
B) Brain development (frontal lobe)
C) Financial status
D) Social skills
questions.explanation: 这是关于大脑发育的幽默说法。额叶（frontal lobe）通常在25岁左右才完全发育成熟。作者在26岁时说自己终于拥有了完全发育的额叶，是一种自嘲。

questions.question: Describe a time when you got lost during a trip and how you handled it.
questions.explanation: 本题为开放式口语题，要求考生根据自身经历描述一次旅行中迷路的经历及解决办法。
questions.referenceAnswer: 考生应描述：1) 迷路的地点和情况 2) 当时的感受 3) 如何找到方向或求助 4) 从中学到了什么
questions.hint: Try to include: where you were, how you felt, what you did to find your way, and what you learned from the experience.

questions.question: What does 'Baby steps' mean in this context?
options: A) Walking with a baby
B) Taking small, gradual progress
C) Going backwards slowly
D) Making quick decisions
questions.explanation: Baby steps是一个习语，意思是小步前进、循序渐进。作者用这个词来表示她正在慢慢尝试新事物。

questions.question: What is the main transportation option mentioned for getting around Miran?
options: A) Cars and taxis
B) Bicycles only
C) Walking on stairs or ramps
D) Buses and trams
questions.explanation: 因为Miran是无车小镇（car-free town），所以主要交通方式是步行，可以使用楼梯或坡道。视频中明确提到：Stairs or ramp?

questions.question: What does 'make this the healthy decision' imply?
options: A) Choosing to eat unhealthy food
B) Choosing a healthier option
C) Going to the doctor
D) Doing more exercise
questions.explanation: 在视频中，作者在选择食物时说I'm going to make this the healthy decision，意思是选择更健康的选择。这是一个关于饮食选择的情境表达。

questions.question: What do you usually do to prepare for a hiking trip? Please describe your preparation process.
questions.explanation: 本题为开放式口语题，要求考生描述徒步旅行前的准备工作。
questions.referenceAnswer: 考生应描述：1) 需要准备的物品（如水、食物、地图、合适的鞋子） 2) 了解路线和天气 3) 告知他人行程 4) 身体准备
questions.hint: You can mention: packing essentials (water, snacks, proper shoes), checking the route, informing someone about your plans, and physical warm-up.

questions.question: Why did the speaker say 'Switzerland is not for the week'?
options: A) Switzerland is only open on weekdays
B) One week is not enough time to explore Switzerland
C) You need at least a month to see Switzerland
D) Switzerland is too expensive for a week trip
questions.explanation: 这是一个感叹，表达一周的时间不足以充分体验瑞士。作者在经历了一次散步后感到疲惫，发出了这样的感叹，表达瑞士幅员辽阔值得更多时间探索。

questions.question: What does 'connect to' mean in 'Main is also the connect to Grindlevald'?
options: A) To disconnect from
B) To serve as a link or gateway to
C) To be similar to
D) To be far away from
questions.explanation: connect to在这里意思是连接、连通。Main是瑞士的一个山峰，也是前往Grindlewald的连接点/中转站。

questions.question: What is a 'balcony' and why does the speaker prefer hotels with balconies in the Swiss Alps?
options: A) A small kitchen in the hotel
B) An outdoor space to enjoy the view
C) A bathroom with a window
D) A meeting room for guests
questions.explanation: balcony是阳台。在瑞士阿尔卑斯山这样风景优美的地方，作者喜欢订有阳台的酒店，以便能欣赏外面的美景。

questions.question: What does 'gliding' refer to in 'I see somebody gliding outside'?
options: A) Swimming
B) Paragliding / hang gliding
C) Running very fast
D) Riding a bicycle
questions.explanation: 在瑞士阿尔卑斯山的语境中，gliding指的是滑翔（可能是滑翔伞）。作者在山上看到有人在外面滑翔，这是一个常见的极限运动。

questions.question: What do you think is the best season to visit the Swiss Alps and why?
questions.explanation: 本题为开放式口语题，要求考生分析去瑞士阿尔卑斯山的最佳季节。
questions.referenceAnswer: 考生可以从以下角度回答：1) 冬季（滑雪、欣赏雪景） 2) 夏季（徒步、登山） 3) 春秋季（人少、色彩丰富）并解释原因
questions.hint: Consider factors like weather, activities available, crowds, and what you want to experience.

questions.question: What does 'the whole way' mean in 'one road that you walk down for the whole time'?
options: A) Only part of the journey
B) The entire journey from start to finish
C) A very short distance
D) A circular route
questions.explanation: the whole way意思是全程、整个路段。作者在描述一条路时说you walk down for the whole time，意思是这条路人可以一直走到底。

questions.question: What does 'figure out' mean in 'figure out how to use the coffee maker'?
options: A) To forget how to use
B) To understand or learn how to use
C) To break the coffee maker
D) To avoid using
questions.explanation: figure out是一个常用短语，意思是弄清楚、理解、学会使用。作者说要学会使用咖啡机来烧水。

questions.question: What is the speaker's attitude towards the restaurant car experience?
options: A) Very disappointed
B) Indifferent
C) Happy but the ride was short
D) Angry about the service
questions.explanation: 作者说I also got to ride in the restaurant car for the first time, but the ride was kind of...（省略了内容，可能是short或quick），表达了第一次坐餐车的愉快体验，但同时也暗示旅程比较短暂。

questions.question: If you had $50 for a meal while traveling, what would you choose to eat and why?
questions.explanation: 本题为开放式口语题，要求考生假设在旅行中有50美元用于一顿饭，会如何选择。
questions.referenceAnswer: 考生可以描述：1) 会选择什么类型的食物 2) 为什么这个选择对她/他有意义 3) 是否会考虑当地特色或营养价值
questions.hint: Think about local cuisine, nutritional value, personal preferences, and whether it's a special occasion.
